scenes.title: Opening
scenes.editIntent: Title card. Set the stage: MSPs manage dozens of customers across chaotic, fragmented environments. Incidents don't wait. The ACN is the answer to reactive operations — this is the promise before the demo.

blocks.text: Incidents don't wait for shift change.
This is what full visibility looks like.

scenes.title: Healthy Tenants
scenes.editIntent: Portfolio overview at rest. Three managed tenants (Acme Corp, Beta Retail, Gamma Health) with live health metrics, SLA risk gauges, and margin bars. The baseline — everything looks normal before the incident hits. Sets up the contrast for scene 03.

blocks.text: Acme Corp. Beta Retail. Gamma Health.

scenes.title: Incident Detected
scenes.editIntent: The incident breaks. Inventory service goes down at Beta Retail. The ACN detects it in 2.1 seconds before any human notices. Full command center view: active incident list, message stream, node/service status bars, and AI terminal output.

blocks.text: Beta Retail just triggered an incident.
The ACN detected it in 2.1 seconds — before any human noticed.

scenes.title: Root Cause
scenes.editIntent: The AI operator's diagnosis. NODE-2003 is the root cause. Blast radius is scoped — checkout degraded, payments unaffected, no cascade. 98.4% confidence. Shows the AI doing what would take a human 45 minutes to piece together.

blocks.text: Checkout is degraded. Payments unaffected. The failure is contained.

scenes.title: Trace Path
scenes.editIntent: Correlation trace across the service graph. cart-ui → checkout-service → inventory-service. The failure boundary is exact: inventory is down, checkout is degraded, payments are isolated. No guessing, no manual log diving.

scenes.title: Playbook Execution
scenes.editIntent: Recovery in action. The playbook executes: health check fails → restart inventory-service → verify event flow → incident resolved. MTTD 2.1s, MTTR 47s, 1.2k transactions/min recovered. The operator didn't need to think — just approve.

blocks.text: The operator runs the recovery playbook.

scenes.title: Time Saved
scenes.editIntent: The impact numbers. 2.1s detection, 4.8s diagnosis — versus 45 minutes of manual triage across 5 tools. YoY chart shows triage time collapsing: 2023 (45 min, tall red bar) vs 2024 (<1 min, tiny green sliver). ↓98% headline.

blocks.text: That would have been 45 minutes of manual triage.

scenes.title: Before vs After
scenes.editIntent: The closing argument. Before: 5 tools, manual correlation, guessing, reactive. After: one view, one operator, instant action, proactive. Land the transformation — you are not debugging systems anymore, you are operating them.

blocks.text: You are not debugging systems anymore. You are operating them.
